text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The two selected Legacy Umamusume and
your Trainee Umamusume have an affinity
level determined by their relationship.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's said that if they share a good affinity,
it becomes a little more likely for
something nice to happen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This might be good to remember when
you're making arrangements in the
future. ♪
